jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at SAIL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, SAIL in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!
